title: Springy Filipino Sausage Tinola
description: Umami and springy, this Filipino-inspired dish featuring Polish sausage in a vegan-friendly pasta-water emulsion is a perfect fit for any festive occasion.
instructions: In a large pot, combine 4 cups of vegetable broth, 1 cup of cooled pasta water, and 1 can of coconut cream. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
While the broth mixture simmers, slice the 12 oz of Polish sausage into 1-inch pieces and cook in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet with the cooked sausage and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Strain the broth mixture and discard the solids.
Add the fish sauce and lime juice to the broth mixture and stir to combine.
Return the cooked sausage and its juices to the pot with the broth mixture and stir to combine.
Season with salt to taste and simmer for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Adjust the seasoning as needed before serving.
